headline: Investor Angst Emerges in Riskiest Stocks Even as AI Trade Flies
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Investors are starting to hedge the risk of a drop in the Russell 2000 Index of smaller companies, despite investors remaining wildly bullish for large-cap stocks.Most Read from BloombergUS Lawmakers Plan New $130 Fee for Electric Vehicle OwnersBillionaire Rinehart Bets $100 Million on US Defense StocksTrump Says Holding Off on New Iran Strikes After Gulf AppealElon Musk Loses Case Against Sam Altman Over OpenAI’s OverhaulStocks and Oil Whipsaw on Mixed US-Iran Signals: Markets Wr
